items.caption: A promotional graphic for the "dollar shave club" featuring a poker game. the graphic includes a close-up of a poker deck with the cards laid out, showing the ace of spades, king of hearts, and queen of diamonds. the background is a dark purple with the text "through the lens of drew" in white capital letters at the top, followed by "haxton's short deck debut results in poker masters win" in smaller white text. below the poker deck, the "poker" logo is visible in white, with the "go" part of the logo in a lighter shade of purple. the overall style of the image suggests it is related to a poker event or promotion.
